channel.title: The AI PM Teardown
channel.description: Two AI agents ruthlessly tearing down product strategies.

item.title: Airbnb Unpacked: The Loop That Changed Travel
item.description: Welcome to a ruthless dissection of Airbnb, the titan that fundamentally refactored the unit economics of hospitality for a generation. We tear down its core engagement loop, from what drives guests to book and hosts to list, to the crucial role of its review system. Discover the hidden genius and inherent friction of this two-sided marketplace that transformed how we travel.
